questions.question: Proverbially speaking, a rising tide lifts all ... what?
The dish spaghetti alla puttanesca originated in which Italian city?
What kind of marsupial was recently found among the plush toys in a Hobart Airport gift shop?
Rank by on-field team size, largest to smallest: rugby league, AFL, rugby union.
Hemophobia is an intense and persistent fear of ... what?
The film KPop Demon Hunters won Oscars for Best Animated Feature and which other category?
Is Australia's largest desert the Great Sandy Desert, the Great Victoria Desert or the Tanami Desert?
Fashion-wise, the power suit is synonymous with which decade?
The name of which Catholic prayer is also a colloquialism for a "last-ditch" desperate effort?
The Crowded House song Don't Dream It's Over includes the lyric, "Try to catch the deluge in a ..." [what?]
Which word can precede fire, log and date to make new words?
Match the Communist-era car to the country: Lada, Škoda, Trabant; East Germany, Soviet Union, Czechoslovakia.
questions.answer: Lada - Soviet Union, Škoda - Czechoslovakia, Trabant - East Germany

questions.question: Medically speaking, what is "tundra tongue"?
questions.answer: The freezing of a person's tongue to a cold metal object, such as a lamp post

questions.question: What is the name of Mario's girlfriend in the original Donkey Kong game?
An invasive species in Australia, fire ants are native to which continent?
Who, in 1991, said that the Gulf War would be "the mother of all battles"?
What is the chemical symbol for potassium?
Which former athlete and politician was nicknamed "The Lithgow Flash"?
Which is the longest river in south-west Asia: the Euphrates, the Jordan or the Tigris?
Which musical instrument is nicknamed "the Mississippi saxophone"?
Who said it? "A woman must have money and a room of her own if she is to write fiction."
Geologically speaking, what are the three main types of rock?
In which state or territory would you find the mining town of Mount Magnet?
Which band's fans refer to themselves as "Blockheads"?
What does the "Moylan Arrow" on a car dashboard point to?
questions.answer: The side of the vehicle where the fuel filler cap (or charging port) is located
